address: 81 St Marks Pl, New York, NY 10003, USA

sources_checked.limitation: Homepage embeds full menu content (sandwiches, rice bowls, snacks, breakfast) with prices and descriptions; address in footer confirms 81 St. Marks Place, NY NY, 10003. No ingredient-level allergen icons beyond one 'gluten-free upon request' note on the Sweet Chili Tofu Bowl.

notes: Restaurant cuisine is Asian-fusion sandwiches/rice bowls (not sushi/Japanese as initially guessed) - menu tagline 'Badass Asian Food, Sandwiches/Rice Bowls/Salads'. No peanut or tree nut ingredients/mentions found anywhere on the menu. Gluten inferences based on wheat breads (ciabatta, brioche, mantou buns), panko breading, macaroni, and sauces commonly containing wheat (hoisin, soy-based braises).
